vocab.example: The sight of the sun dipping below the ocean horizon was enough to take my breath away.
We reached the cliff edge and could finally feast our eyes on the emerald valley below.

vocab.meaning: bao trùm/lan tỏa (cảm giác hoặc ánh sáng qua một không gian)
vocab.example: A sense of utter peace swept over me as I watched the morning mist lift from the lake.

vocab.meaning: thu trọn mọi thứ vào tầm mắt/tận hưởng trọn vẹn
vocab.example: I stood there in silence for ten minutes, just trying to take it all in before we headed back down.
As night fell, the entire city started to light up, creating a dazzling display of neon colors.

vocab.meaning: che khuất/làm lu mờ (thường nói về mây hoặc sương)
vocab.example: The clouds would occasionally blot out the peak, adding a layer of mystery to the landscape.

vocab.meaning: cao sừng sững/áp đảo phía trên
vocab.example: The limestone karsts tower over the bay, making everything else look minuscule in comparison.

vocab.meaning: dần thấm thía/cảm nhận sâu sắc (vẻ đẹp)
vocab.example: It took a few moments for the sheer scale of the Grand Canyon to really sink in.
From my hotel window, I could gaze out at the vast expanse of the desert for hours.

vocab.meaning: làm nổi bật lên (vẻ đẹp hoặc đặc điểm)
vocab.example: The golden sunlight really brought out the rich textures of the ancient stone walls.
